title: Unsuspicious Stew
description: Displays all Effects of a Suspicious Stew in the Tooltip and Hotbar
body:
This mod Displays all effects a Suspicious Stew Item has plus the duration of each effect in the tooltip of the item and when you swap onto it in the hotbar.

 

By using this mod you'll never get surprised of the effects of a Suspicious Stew. Stay healthy and don't poison yourself!
